2606.06027.title: RedditPersona: A Modular Framework for Community-Conditioned LLM Adaptation from Reddit
2606.06027.paper_summary: Community-conditioned language model adaptation requires choices about data collection, community definition, and evaluation that are currently made independently in each study, making it hard to compare assumptions or reuse artifacts. We present RedditPersona, a modular framework that standardizes these choices: it collects Reddit posts and comments, profiles active users, partitions them under five grouping strategies (subreddit-based, graph-structural, semantic, hybrid, and interaction-based), trains a parameter-efficient adapter per strategy via QLoRA, and evaluates them under a shared metric suite spanning fluency, fidelity, distributional alignment, and community identifiability. Applied to 112 subreddits in the urban well-being domain (301,429 user profiles, 16M+ comments), we find that adapters' behavioral identifiability tracks each strategy's intrinsic agreement with the subreddit baseline, and that a consistent trade-off between identifiability and distributional similarity to real text holds across all five strategies. The code and configuration files are available at: https://github.com/Ahghaffari/redditpersona.
2606.06027.paper_summary_zh: 社群條件化的語言模型適應需要在數據收集、社群定義和評估方面做出選擇，而這些選擇目前在每個研究中都是獨立做出的，這使得比較假設或重用工件變得困難。我們提出了 RedditPersona，一個模組化框架，標準化這些選擇：它收集 Reddit 的帖子和評論，分析活躍用戶，根據五種分組策略（基於子版塊、圖結構、語義、混合和基於互動）對其進行分區，通過 QLoRA 為每種策略訓練一個參數高效的適配器，並在一套共享的評估指標下進行評估，涵蓋流暢性、真實性、分佈對齊和社群可識別性。應用於城市福祉領域的 112 個子版塊（301,429 個用戶檔案，超過 1600 萬條評論），我們發現適配器的行為可識別性與每種策略與子版塊基線的內在一致性相關，並且在所有五種策略中，識別性與與真實文本的分佈相似性之間存在一致的權衡。代碼和配置文件可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/Ahghaffari/redditpersona。
2606.06027.author: Amirhossein Ghaffari et.al.
2606.06027.authors: Amirhossein Ghaffari, Ali Goodarzi, Huong Nguyen, Simo Hosio, Lauri Lovén, Ekaterina Gilman
